message:
🐛 Fix feedback modal positioning and consistent sizing (#102)

- Use React Portal to render modal at document.body level
- Increase z-index to 9999 to appear above all content
- Make modal wider (lg size) and taller (min-h-80vh)
- Move footer outside tab content for consistent height
- Fix scroll areas to maintain height when switching tabs
- Add flex-shrink-0 to fixed elements in Updates tab
- Clean up unused imports in BaseModal

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
